Agent1 Round 1: The calcaneal (heel bone) angle, also known as the lateral malleolar notch or sinus tarsi angle, can be used to assess fractures involving this area. A significant change in this angle suggests an injury such as a calcaneal fracture which often occurs due to high-impact trauma like falls from height.
